info.title: Mailjet API
info.description: Mailjet is a transactional and marketing email API. Send emails, manage contacts and contact lists, create campaigns, view statistics, and manage templates. Supports both Send API v3.1 for transactional emails and REST API v3 for resource management.

post.description: Send one or more transactional emails using the Send API v3.1. Supports HTML and text content, attachments, inline images, templates, and custom variables.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all contacts.

post.description: Create a new contact with an email address.

get.description: Retrieve a specific contact by ID or email address.

post.summary: Manage multiple contacts in a list
post.description: Add or remove multiple contacts from a contact list in a single request.

get.description: Retrieve list recipient records showing contact-list membership.

post.summary: Subscribe a contact to a list
post.description: Create a list recipient record to subscribe a contact to a contact list.

get.description: Retrieve a list of sent messages with delivery status information.
Retrieve details of a specific sent message.
Retrieve email sending statistics with various counters.

parameters.name: SourceID
parameters.description: ID of the source entity (campaign ID, list ID, etc.)

get.description: Retrieve a list of email templates.
Retrieve the HTML and text content of a template.

post.description: Update the HTML and text content of a template.

Text-part.description: Plain text content of the template

get.description: Retrieve a list of registered sender addresses.

post.description: Register a new sender email address.

EmailType.description: Type of emails to send from this address

get.description: Retrieve a list of campaign draft newsletters.

post.description: Create a new campaign draft newsletter.
Send a campaign draft newsletter to its recipients.

BasicAuth.description: HTTP Basic authentication using your Mailjet API Key as username and Secret Key as password

SandboxMode.description: If true, messages are validated but not sent

Globals.description: Global properties applied to all messages
